subject: writing
activity_templates: A 3rd-grade cursive worksheet for a single uppercase cursive letter. Top: the letter shown in large cursive form with directional arrows. Below: 4 rows of dotted cursive letters on handwriting lines for tracing. {{character}} holds a fancy pen.
A lowercase cursive letter practice worksheet. Letter at top in large cursive form with stroke arrows. 4 tracing rows and 2 blank rows on handwriting guidelines. {{character}} sits at a desk.

A cursive word practice worksheet. A kid-friendly word shown in large cursive with dotted tracing form, then 3 tracing rows and 2 blank rows for the child to write it independently. A small illustration of the word next to the title. {{character}} cheers.
A short cursive sentence worksheet. A 3-word sentence in dotted cursive at the top, then 3 tracing rows and 2 blank practice rows on handwriting guidelines. {{character}} reads the sentence.
